references.reason: A low market-side step in the Human Village puts Tenshi on the ground, with her keystone deliberately left uphill beyond the stalls, making the ordinary meal a chosen context rather than a Heaven terrace.
A solid black rim with one white wedge-shaped chip keeps the bowl useful and its history legible in one bit.
A short irregular black edge on otherwise white rice distinguishes a valued crisp piece from generic food detail.
A folded note with route ticks connects the meal to ordinary carrying and market work without using class caricature.
The journal preserves precise critique, transparent enjoyment, and ground level as Tenshi's choice rather than her punishment.
